Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment compared to the average time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Request Payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in variants that include a prior rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that do not experience any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER versus average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in re-submitted cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in successful (non-rejected) paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants with no intermediate rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR compared to the same interval when Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION is used instead
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in cases that complete within the standard reimbursement window (within two months after trip)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER measured from case start (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE) to its completion
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'
